bio.es: Al frente de Calma Society, la revista de lujo tranquilo sobre Menorca.
bio.en: Behind Calma Society, the quiet-luxury magazine about Menorca.

seoDescription.es: Cristian Camps dirige Calma Society, la revista de lujo tranquilo sobre Menorca: criterio editorial, experiencia local y una mirada serena de la isla.
seoDescription.en: Cristian Camps is the editor of Calma Society, the quiet-luxury magazine about Menorca: editorial judgement, local experience and a serene island view.
